prompts.text: Before they start, ask: "What colour will you use for the [part]? Why did you choose that?"
Name colours as they pick: "That's [colour] — it's a [warm/cool] colour. Warm colours are red, orange and yellow. Cool colours are blue, green and purple."
Narrate their choices: "You're making the sun yellow — good thinking, suns are bright and warm."
Ask: "What colours can you see on a real [object]? Did you use the same ones?"
